misc: Regularly competes in the Finnish Mid Tour as well with decent results
biography: Sami, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, is set to make his eighth appearance at the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026. Representing Hirsala Golf, Sami brings a dedicated spirit to the competition.

Known for his tenacious approach, Sami has yet to capture the coveted Hector Trophée or the Victor Trophy, but his consistent presence underscores his commitment to the sport and the tournament. Beyond the Hector Trophée, Sami regularly competes in the Finnish Mid Tour, achieving commendable results that reflect his broader dedication to golf.

Off the course, Sami is known to be a very quiet and calculating person, always thinking about his next move. His fellow players know him to be a strategic mastermind, trying to get into their heads at every opportunity.
